name: io.github.ertad-family/liquid
title: Liquid
description: Connect your AI agent to anything — APIs, databases, and agents; read and write, auto-discovered.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI (or compatible) API key for discovery

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL, e.g. local Ollama/vLLM

environmentVariables.name: LIQUID_ALLOW_WRITES
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to expose the liquid_execute write tool (database insert/update/delete). Off by default — read-only.
